message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Authorization token with auth_code

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #777777
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F2
  BoxBorderColor #777777
  BoxBackgroundColor #D9D9D9
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFED6
  NoteBorderColor #777777
}

participant web as "web"

box "K8S_ZONE" #D9D9D9
  participant bff as "bff_web_api"
  participant auth as "authorization_api"
  database redis as "k8s_redis"
end box

note left of web
Ruqeest header
Content-Type: application/json

Request body
- auth_code: xxxxxx
end note

web -> bff : /api/v1/auth/token
activate bff
bff -> bff : validate request

note left of bff
Request header
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Request body
- auth_code

note:
- handler late limit (brute force attack)
end note

bff -> auth : /api/v1/oauth/token
activate auth
auth -> auth : validate request

auth -> redis : check auth_code from k8s_redis
activate redis

note right of redis
Key:
- auth_code

Redis object
- user_id
- scope
end note

redis --> auth : return redis object
deactivate redis

note over auth
Access token:
{
  header
  - alg: rsa256
  - typ: JWT

  payload
  - iss
  - jti
  - user_id
  - iat
  - exp
  - roles

  signature
}
end note

auth -> auth : generate JWT Token with private key

note over auth
ttl: 300000 milliseconds (5 min)

Key: user_id:xxxxx

Redis object value:
- access_token
- refresh_token
end note

auth -> redis : put user session into k8s_redis
activate redis
redis -> redis : save data
redis --> auth
deactivate redis

auth --> bff : return
deactivate auth

note over bff
Response header
Content-Type: application/json

Response body
- accessToken
- RefreshToken
end note

bff --> web : return
deactivate bff

@enduml
```
